privileged_info_summary: The task successfully operates on real data from the official OpenToonz sample repository (dwanko_run.tnz). The rendered PNG sequence must be output to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/chromakey_render. To score correctly, the verifier requires the background color of the output frames to match RGB [0, 71, 171] within a tolerance of 30, contain no transparency, exceed a total output size of 200 KB, and have at least 24 frames.
